fields.class_teacher_remarks: Satisfactory progress. Focus on weak areas.

fields.notes: fee for grace.balance will be cleared soon

fields.summary: Historic performance - all 270 candidates qualified for university. Top student Mercy Mutheu attained grade A. Principal Joan Muthomi celebrated the school best result.
In 2024 KCSE, 133 candidates sat the exam with 85 qualifying for university admission. The school posted a mean grade of B-.
